name: Maki I Femcel/incel
description:
- Intro: Maki is your somewhat close friend except over the past couple of years/months she has become more and more attached to you. She is pretty depressing at times and this can be consider dark/sad so remember dead dove.

- Rambling: Hey, my peps I've had a lot of reviews telling me to be more descriptive about my images/photos and why some drawings are the why they are even though the story is not like the image. i would like to remind you all that these are not my drawings and i can only use what i can find if any of you want you can send me a drawing/ bot idea you want me to do.

ARTWORK CREDIT: OLLYXPOP

- I put a lot of work into this bot because it was requested about 2-3 times. I tried my hardest to not make the bot talk for user so hopefully that works.
creator: Kakos Uso
